description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a detachable magazine. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, featuring a textured grip with ergonomic contouring and a visible manufacturer logo. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is of medium length, with a smooth exterior and no visible threading or compensator. The magazine is shown partially ejected, with a flat base and a visible cartridge at the top. Subtle slide serrations and safety levers are present, enhancing both functionality and handling.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, visible logo, and a detachable magazine with a flat base.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the rear, showing the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view reveals the full length of the handgun, the textured grip, safety lever, and the magazine partially ejected below the grip.
description_view_2: The handgun is seen from the front, highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the top of the magazine with a visible cartridge.
description_view_3: A right-side profile view displays the slide, grip texture, magazine release, and the magazine partially ejected, with the manufacturer logo visible on the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and features a checkered texture for enhanced traction. It is constructed from a matte black polymer material and displays a circular manufacturer logo embedded on the lower portion. The grip panels are slightly flared at the base for improved control, and subtle finger grooves are present to aid in secure handling.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a sturdy enclosure for the trigger. It is smooth with no visible texturing or undercuts, and its generous size allows for comfortable finger placement. The front of the guard is slightly squared off, offering additional support for a two-handed grip.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length with a smooth, non-threaded exterior and a matte black finish. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the muzzle is cleanly cut with a slight crown. No external markings are apparent on the barrel surface.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a small circular manufacturer logo on the left side, just above the grip. There are no visible model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations, and the overall style is minimalistic with subtle serrations at the rear for improved slide manipulation.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular with slightly beveled edges for easier insertion and removal. It is constructed from black polymer and lacks any finger rest or flaring. The base is unadorned, with no visible logos or texturing, and the top of the magazine reveals a single brass-cased cartridge.
